pi_items.source: setup_task.sh:33 creates Company(name='SkyHigh Services'); export_result.sh:33 hardcodes expected_operator as 'SkyHigh Services'
setup_task.sh:30 creates Manufacturer(name='DroneCorp Global'); export_result.sh:34 hardcodes expected_manufacturer as 'DroneCorp Global'

privileged_info_summary: The task involves processing a warranty replacement in the Aerobridge aircraft registry system. A crashed drone with registration SH-CRASH-001 owned by SkyHigh Services and manufactured by DroneCorp Global must be decommissioned by renaming it with '[WRITE-OFF]' and setting its status to inactive. A replacement aircraft with registration SH-REPL-002 must then be registered to the same operator (SkyHigh Services) and manufacturer (DroneCorp Global). All test data is synthetically created via Django ORM in setup_task.sh and verified through hardcoded expected values in export_result.sh.
